final:
module binary_counter_6bit_enable(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    output reg [5:0] count
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        count <= 6'b000000;
    end else if (en) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
